title: Home
html:
👋 Welcome to the Certipy Wiki

This wiki is your guide to abusing Active Directory Certificate Services (AD CS) with Certipy. Whether you're just getting started or diving into advanced post-exploitation, here's where to go:

  • 📘 Introduction - Overview of AD CS and the Certipy toolkit.
  • 🏷️ Terminology - Definitions of key AD CS and Certipy concepts.
  • 🔗 Resources - Curated list of blogs, research, and external documentation.
  • 💻 Installation - How to install Certipy and its dependencies.
  • ⚙️ Usage - Usage examples, syntax, and command-line workflows.
  • 🔥 Privilege Escalation - ESC1-ESC16 breakdown and exploitation steps.
  • 🗝️ Post-Exploitation - Forging certificates, persistence, and lateral movement.
  • 📑 Command Reference - Full list of Certipy commands and available options.
